mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medical_document (file_name, file_url, content, chunk_count, status) VALUES (#{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{content}, #{chunkCount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, file_name, file_url, content, chunk_count, status, create_time FROM medical_document WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE medical_document SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
